BSTD
A lightweight C library providing common data structures and utilities for systems programming.

12#ifndef BSTD_STRING_H
13#define BSTD_STRING_H
14
15#include "bstd/error.h"
16#include "bstd/result.h"
17#include <stdbool.h>
18#include <stddef.h>
19
20#define BSTD_STRING_NULL_TERM 1
21
22typedef struct
23{
24 char *data;
25 size_t length;
26 size_t capacity;
27} bstd_string;
28
29typedef struct
30{
31 bool ok;
32 union
33 {
34 bstd_string value;
35 bstd_error error;
36 };
37} bstd_string_result;
